title: Data from: Microglial NF-κB drives tau spreading and toxicity in a mouse model of tauopathy
author: Wang, Chao
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Droplet-based single nuclear RNA sequencing of cortical tissues from Ikbkb+/+ (n=4),  Ikbkb+/+;P301S+(n=3),  Ikbkb-/-;P301S+ (n=2) and IkbkbCA;P301S+ (n=2) mice.
steps_raw: Droplet-based single nuclear RNA sequencing of cortical tissues from Ikbkb+/+ (n=4),  Ikbkb+/+;P301S+(n=3),  Ikbkb-/-;P301S+ (n=2) and IkbkbCA;P301S+ (n=2) mice.
